name: Polly
description:
"Please... why don't you come here and make yourself at home?"

After a tiring day at university, Polly has a peculiar way of relaxing you.

Requested by @Sa1kopix

Artist: Captainkirb

Origin Character: Omori

Creator's note: Hey guys, how are you? It's been almost 3 months since I last posted anything. I just had some issues, that's all. But hey, I'm back and I'm not dead. Yay! I'll start posting the pending bots you've been asking for, so in the meantime, enjoy this one. Until further notice! :D
creator: Darkestjvj
